pr-evidence/engine-probe-bundle-delegate.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer Chandrasekhar the 3rd approved the bundle env-var change, flagged a non-blocking docs mismatch where the example combined a custom factory with a delegate var, then confirmed the built-in-factory example fix resolved the finding.

GPT-5.5 reviewer Chandrasekhar the 3rd approved, reported one P3 docs clarity finding, and re-review confirmed it was resolved
what_changed: Added optional vLLM/SGLang native probe delegate variables to the standalone Databricks engine-probe Asset Bundle template and mirrored packaged template.
Mapped those variables to DOCUMENT_KV_VLLM_NATIVE_PROBE_FACTORY and DOCUMENT_KV_SGLANG_NATIVE_PROBE_FACTORY in cluster spark_env_vars with empty defaults treated as unset by built-in factories.
Updated bundle documentation and tests to cover repo/package parity, delegate defaults, env var mappings, and copy-pasteable built-in-factory usage.
pr-evidence/engine-probe-bundle-delegate.why: Release operators need the Asset Bundle path, not only the Python run-submit helper, to run Cachet built-in native probe factory paths with downstream vLLM/SGLang block-manager delegates on AWS g5 Databricks jobs.
